description: Fix 'Gagal menyimpan: No document to update' error in simpanTestKesehatan by adding id validation and fallback to set with merge when update fails.
steps: In simpanTestKesehatan(id), add validation that id is a non-empty trimmed string before attempting update
Wrap the update call in a try-catch that falls back to db.collection().doc(id).set(updateData, { merge: true }) when update fails with 'No document to update' error
Ensure the else branch (add new doc) is reached when id is empty or whitespace-only
acceptance_criteria: When id is empty or whitespace-only, the function creates a new document instead of failing
When id is valid but document does not exist in Firestore, the function falls back to set with merge instead of throwing an error
Existing behavior for valid update (id exists and document exists) is preserved
verification: Grep for 'set(updateData' or 'set(' with merge in the file
